reasoning: The Wikipedia ranking for November 1, 2025 was already published on October 31, 2025, listing Vaishali Rameshbabu's Elo at 2473. Thus, for the resolution dates of 2025-11-02 and 2025-11-25, her rating calculated from the Wikipedia page will be 2473. Since the question asks whether the rating will be at least 1% higher than 2473 (which requires a rating of 2498 or more), the outcome is a definitive negative for the first two dates. For the third date (2026-01-24), corresponding to the January 2026 FIDE rating list, a jump of 25 Elo points over two months of classical play is possible but difficult for a player at the 2470+ level. The probability is estimated at around 18%, reflecting the significant challenge of gaining +25 points in a short timespan.
